diagrams.title: Morphological Dilation Process
diagrams.description: Shows binary image with square object being dilated by 3x3 square SE. Each foreground pixel acts as origin for SE placement, causing expansion in all directions.
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how dilation expands foreground regions by the structuring element radius

diagrams.title: Hit-or-Miss Transform Pattern
diagrams.description: Diagram showing foreground SE (white) and background SE (gray) requirements. Center pixel is tested against both conditions simultaneously.
elements: Background SE pattern (single pixel at center)
diagrams.purpose: Illustrate the dual-condition matching required for morphological pattern detection

diagrams.title: Opening vs Closing Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing same object processed by opening and closing operations with same SE.
elements: Original object with noise spikes and holes
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate between opening (erosion-dilation) and closing (dilation-erosion) effects
